description: Auto-redirect to recap when battle ends if extension disabled
context:
Beads description:
When a battle's timer expires and allow_time_extension is false, automatically redirect all participants to the recap page.

## Files to modify
- src/routes/(style)/(app)/battle/[id]/code/BattleMode.svelte (or wherever timer logic lives)
- May need to check battle status handling

## Current Behavior
When timer reaches 0, battle stays in pending/waiting state until referee clicks 'End Battle'.

## New Behavior
When timer reaches 0:
- If allow_time_extension is true: Current behavior (wait for ref)
- If allow_time_extension is false: 
  1. Update battle status to ENDED (may need server action)
  2. Redirect all participants to /recap/[battleId]

## Implementation Notes
- Need to detect timer expiration
- Check battle.allow_time_extension value
- Either trigger mutation to end battle, or have server-side cron/check
- Navigate to recap page: goto(`/recap/${battle.id}`)

## Consideration
The redirect should happen for ALL participants in the battle simultaneously.
May need to use Zero's real-time sync - when battle status changes to ENDED, 
components should detect and redirect.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Battles with allow_time_extension=false auto-end when timer expires
- All participants redirected to recap
- Battles with allow_time_extension=true work as before
- No race conditions or double-redirects
